description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the aheuermann/electron:latest Docker image and caches node_modules/ and app/node_modules/. Define two stages: test and bundle, and add a before_script that starts Xvfb with "Xvfb -ac -screen scrn 1280x2000x24 :9.0 &", exports DISPLAY=:9.0, installs gulp and electron-prebuilt globally via "npm install gulp electron-prebuilt -g --no-progress --quiet --depth 0", and runs a local "npm install --no-progress --quiet --depth 0". In the test stage add a unit_test job running "npm test", a code_coverage job running "npm run coverage" and publishing the coverage/ directory as a coverage_report artifact, and an e2e_test job running "npm run e2e". In the bundle stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes "npm install -g plato --no-progress --quiet --depth 0" and "plato -r -d public src", caches the public/ folder, and stores the public/ directory as a plato_report artifact. Also add a release job that runs only on master, executes "npm run release", and uploads the generated dist/*.deb files as a package artifact.
